message:
feat(scripts): Add keyboard shortcut table generator for README

Creates scripts/generate-keyboard-tables.ts that derives markdown
tables from ActionRegistry. Groups shortcuts by category with proper
formatting using the existing formatKeyCombo function.

Run with: bun scripts/generate-keyboard-tables.ts

Closes: phage_explorer-s4qx.1.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
